error_signature: credentials not retained after server restart
title: Credentials not retained in Docker with Postgres
symptom: Every time the n8n server is restarted, all credentials must be set up again. This leads to loss of configuration and workflow interruptions.
root_cause: Without a persistent volume mapped to the n8n data directory, all data, including credentials, is lost when the Docker container is stopped or restarted. This is a common issue when self-hosting n8n without proper volume configuration.
fix_steps: Modify your Docker Compose file to include a volume for the n8n data directory.
Use the following configuration: volumes: - n8n_data:/home/node/.n8n
Run 'docker compose up' to start the container with the new configuration.
agent_instruction: Ensure to set a volume for the n8n data directory in your Docker setup.
